title: 邊個耶教教徒發明飯前領禱架

replies.msg:
次次食飯 耶教親戚一見多半數人耶教就提議領禱
之後就有一半人dup低頭 瞇埋眼
唔係耶教果d 包括我就眼光光等佢哋
用分幾鐘多謝完上帝先有得開餐
場面非常尷尬 拍得住關家姐
最弊係我細佬之前信 而家又唔係好信
見佢每次都猶豫祈唔祈禱好 就仲尷尬
又唔知耶教親戚有冇偷望
面對領禱 點可以避免霸氣盡失

教徒要感謝神啫
其實你可以食先喎
耶撚祈禱既時候 我會偷偷地食住先
正常唔係5秒祈完架啦咩....

趁人哋祈禱你就即刻夾左件雞肶
先下手為強

replies.msg:
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Last_Supper
Last Supper
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
Jump to navigationJump to search
For other uses, see The Last Supper (disambiguation).
The Last Supper by Leonardo da Vinci - Clickable Image
Depictions of the Last Supper in Christian art have been undertaken by artistic masters for centuries, Leonardo da Vinci's late-1490s mural painting in Milan, Italy, being the best-known example.[1] (Clickable image—use cursor to identify.)
The Last Supper is the final meal that, in the Gospel accounts, Jesus shared with his apostles in Jerusalem before his crucifixion.[2] The Last Supper is commemorated by Christians especially on Maundy Thursday.[3] The Last Supper provides the scriptural basis for the Eucharist, also known as "Holy Communion" or "The Lord's Supper".[4]

感謝天父 賜我飲食
求主潔淨 保我平安
奉主名求 阿們
